content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward modules (ICM/RND) used in 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory can be reframed as a recursive self-expanding agent that curates its own memory storage, rather than just a reward signal for exploration. This means an agent’s memory system is itself a second-tier active agent that actively selects which new experiences to encode, prune, or retrieve based on intrinsic curiosity, rather than passively storing data selected by the primary task agent.
